title: HQ Agent Session Request
description: Versioned request envelope that hq-pro (or any producer) sends to the on-box HQ Agent Session entrypoint. Validated by core/scripts/hq-agent-session.sh before any provider work begins.

contractVersion.description: Integer contract version. Must match or be less than core/core.yaml agentSessionContractVersion on the box. Absent or non-integer values are rejected.

companySlug.description: Company directory slug under companies/ that this turn is authorized for.

messageText.description: Untrusted channel body for this turn.

provider.description: Which on-box provider adapter to invoke.

verified.description: Whether the producer authenticated the sender as an active company member.

sender.description: Sender trust metadata. verified is required; additional identity fields may be present.

rehydration.description: Optional formatted prior-turn block from the conversation store. null when unavailable.

rehydrationTurnCount.description: Number of turns represented in rehydration. 0 when rehydration is null or empty.

project.description: Optional project slug for durable writes under companies/{co}/projects/{project}/.
